mapper.select: SELECT * FROM aggregation_alert WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM aggregation_alert WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM aggregation_alert WHERE area_code = #{areaCode} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM aggregation_alert WHERE alert_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_time DESC
